basic_details.job_title: TMC ACTREC Specialist Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation is applicable: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for Physically Handicapped candidates. Age and experience are to be considered as on 31-07-2026.

qualification.education_qualification: DM/DrNB in Medical Oncology OR DM/DrNB in Clinical Haematology OR DM/DrNB in Clinical Immunology+ Rheumatology OR MD/DNB in General Medicine/Pediatrics/Transfusion Medicine/Family Medicine recognized by NMC with 3 years of experience in Medical Oncology/ Clinical Hematology/ Pediatric Oncology.
qualification.details: DM/DrNB in Medical Oncology OR DM/DrNB in Clinical Haematology OR DM/DrNB in Clinical Immunology+ Rheumatology OR MD/DNB in General Medicine/Pediatrics/Transfusion Medicine/Family Medicine recognized by NMC with 3 years of experience in Medical Oncology/ Clinical Hematology/ Pediatric Oncology.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TMC ACTREC Specialist Senior Resident (BMT) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TMC ACTREC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download TMC ACTREC Specialist Senior Resident (BMT) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TMC ACTREC SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the TMC ACTREC SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) recruitment is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) post as per the released notification. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a DM/DrNB in Medical Oncology OR DM/DrNB in Clinical Haematology OR DM/DrNB in Clinical Immunology+Rheumatology OR MD/DNB in General Medicine/Pediatrics/Transfusion Medicine/Family Medicine with 3 years of experience in relevant fields.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) post is 40 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST, OBC, and Physically Handicapped candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 1,45,530/- per month (Gross Pay).

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the TMC ACTREC SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official TMC ACTREC website. The application process involves filling out the form, uploading documents, and paying the application fee, if applicable.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for the SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) post?
faq.answer: The application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 1000/-. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any specific details regarding fee payment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) post includes an MCQ test, followed by an Interview and VIVA. Candidates need to perform well in all stages to be considered.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for the SPECIALIST SENIOR RESIDENT (BMT) post is on a contract basis. Candidates should refer to the official notification for detailed terms and conditions.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article. You can also visit the official TMC ACTREC website for more information.
